name: Spam Confetti Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cut into 2-inch strips (12 oz)
12 ounces Angel hair pasta, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet coated with cooking spray, sauté corn, SPAM, bell peppers, and onion over medium heat for 5 minutes or until tender. Transfer the mixture to a bowl; keep warm.
2. Add cream, chili powder, and pepper to the same skillet. Bring to a boil, then boil for an additional 5 minutes or until the cream has slightly thickened, stirring occasionally.
3. Pour the sauce over the pasta and toss well.
4. Spoon the SPAM mixture over the pasta.
5. To serve, sprinkle with chopped tomatoes and cilantro.
